s-1.ptxt: INSPECT AND ADJUST CLUTCH PEDAL HEIGHT

s2.ptxt: If necessary, adjust the pedal height.

s3.ptxt: Loosen the lock nut and turn the clutch switch until the height is correct. Tighten the lock nut.

s-1.ptxt: INSPECT CLUTCH PEDAL FREE PLAY AND PUSH ROD PLAY

s2.ptxt: Check that the pedal free play and push rod play are correct.

s3.ptxt: Depress the pedal until clutch resistance is felt.
Gently depress the pedal until the resistance begins to increase a little.

spec.title: Push rod play at pedal top

s2.ptxt: Adjust the pedal free play and push rod play.

s3.ptxt: Loosen the lock nut and turn the push rod until the free play and push rod play are correct.
After adjusting the pedal free play, check the pedal height.
Pull the parking brake lever and install the wheel stopper.
Without depressing the clutch pedal, slowly move the shift lever to the reverse position until the gears are engaged.
Gradually depress the clutch pedal and measure the stroke distance from the point that the gear noise stops (release point) to the full stroke end position.

specitem.ptxt: 25 mm (0.98 in.) or more (From pedal stroke end position to release point)

s3.ptxt: If the distance is not as specified, perform the following operations:

item.ptxt: Check push rod play and pedal free play.
Check the clutch cover assembly and disc assembly.
